description_long: This is a modern, two-seater sofa upholstered in a smooth, light beige material, likely faux leather or leather. The sofa features broad, rounded armrests that are heavily padded and seamlessly integrated into the overall form, giving it a plush and inviting appearance. The seat and backrest are divided into two distinct, slightly contoured cushions, both of which are attached and uniform in size, providing ample support and comfort. The backrest is moderately high and gently curved, matching the soft, rounded lines of the armrests and base. The sofa sits low to the ground, with its legs either recessed or hidden, contributing to a streamlined, monolithic silhouette. The upholstery is solid in color with minimal visible stitching, emphasizing a clean and contemporary aesthetic.
description: A plush, light beige two-seater sofa with broad, rounded armrests and smooth, solid upholstery. The design is modern and inviting, with attached seat and back cushions and a low, streamlined profile.
description_view_0: Front view shows two attached seat and back cushions, broad padded armrests, and a smooth, solid beige surface.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the thick, rounded armrest and the gentle curve of the backrest, with the seat cushion depth visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the continuous, slightly curved backrest and the monolithic, seamless base with no visible legs.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the same rounded armrest and the sofa's overall depth and padding.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two attached, uniform seat cushions and two attached, uniform back cushions, all seamlessly integrated and non-removable.
attribute_armrest_style: Broad, rounded, and heavily padded armrests that are integrated into the sofa's body, rising slightly above the seat level with a smooth, continuous profile and no decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Legs are not visible, suggesting a hidden or recessed base design that gives the sofa a grounded, monolithic appearance.
attribute_backrest_type: Moderately high, gently curved, continuous backrest with two attached, uniform cushions and no visible tufting or segmentation.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid, smooth upholstery in a light beige color with minimal visible stitching and no decorative patterns or texturing.
